name: edu-sim
description: Run a 30-teacher Korean edutech persona simulation and synthesize blind spots.

interface.longDescription: Edu Sim runs all 30 fixed Korean teacher personas against a policy, product, business, or experiment proposal, then synthesizes surprises, blind spots, and decision implications into a Markdown report.
defaultPrompt: Use edu-sim to simulate teacher reactions to this proposal
Use edu-sim to find blind spots in this edutech strategy
